summary: Navigation restructuring tested successfully. All 8 tabs present (Accueil, Profil, Trajectoire, Compétences, Marché, Opportunités, Coffre-fort, Confidentialité). All routes working correctly with proper viewMode filtering. Legacy redirects functional. Coffre-fort reduced to 3 tabs as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation restructuring implemented correctly - 9 tabs reduced to 8
PassportView viewMode prop working correctly - profil mode shows only Profil/Expériences/Passerelles/Profil Dynamique tabs
PassportView viewMode prop working correctly - competences mode shows only Inventaire/Évaluation/Archéologie/Émergentes tabs
ParticulierView viewMode prop working correctly - accueil shows nav cards, trajectoire shows timeline without tab bar
LeMarcheView correctly combines Observatoire/Évolution/Explorateur into 3 sub-tabs
OpportunitesView correctly combines Matching/Formations into 2 sub-tabs
All legacy routes redirect correctly (passeport→profil, observatoire/evolution/explorateur→marche, jobs/learning→opportunites)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation restructuring complete. 8 tabs for particulier role: Accueil, Profil, Trajectoire, Compétences, Marché, Opportunités, Coffre-fort, Confidentialité. All viewMode props working correctly to filter visible tabs in PassportView and ParticulierView.
